title: ORA Resources — Overview
content: The Morgan State University Office of Research Administration (ORA) Resources page collects the primary self-service materials available to faculty, PIs, and research staff. The page links to: (1) Principal Investigator Handbooks — a series of five Principal Investigator's Handbooks written to assist Morgan State University faculty and employees with the development of proposals for sponsored projects and management of their awards (PI Handbook 1: General Principles; PI Handbook 2: Budget Preparation; PI Handbook 3: Grant-Related Processes; PI Handbook 4: Research Facilities & Resources; PI Handbook 5: Policies & Guidelines). (2) Funding Sources — Funding Opportunities Databases and Listings. (3) Successful Proposal and Budget Examples — located under the Pre-Award section. (4) Templates — templates with samples for several letters that might be required for an award issued to MSU faculty (Subaward to MSU Commitment Letter, Civil Rights Protections for NIH Grants Letter, Change of PI Request Letter, No-Cost Extension Letter, Termination of Work Letter). (5) ORA Announcements list-serv — join the list serv to get emails sent directly to you from the ORA. To subscribe, email ask.ora@morgan.edu with the subject line: 'Sign me up for ORA Announcements'. ORA contact: Tyler Hall, Student Service Bldg, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251 — phone 443-885-4044, fax 443-885-8280, email ask.ora@morgan.edu.
